# AdsMerce

> Performance marketing agency for e-commerce brands. Meta Ads first, Google Ads where it
> compounds results, plus creative production (UGC video and static ads), landing pages & CRO,
> AI automation and e-commerce growth consulting. Track record: 8+ years, €50M+ ad spend
> managed on Meta, 20+ e-commerce brands scaled across the EU, 4.3× average blended ROAS,
> Meta Certified Media Buyer. Access to agency ad accounts through Meta's official partner
> Aleph (better account stability, human support from Meta).

Languages: English (default) and Bosnian/Croatian/Serbian (auto-detected for BA/RS/HR/ME visitors).
Contact: hello@adsmerce.com. Engagements start with a free audit (5-minute Loom video analysis);
no long-term contract lock-ins, month-to-month collaboration.

## Pages

- [Home](https://adsmerce.com/): services, results, process, FAQ and contact options
- [Blog](https://adsmerce.com/blog/): practical writing on performance marketing, creative and CRO
- [Google Ads starter package](https://adsmerce.com/blog/google-ads-starter-offer.html): fixed-scope offer for adding Google Ads as a second channel
- [For UGC creators](https://adsmerce.com/ugc.html): paid UGC video collaborations — application form for creators
